episode.title: Severe Surname Garbles: A Marine Biologist's Return

feed.description: Scuba diving stories and skills: safety, marine life, travel, and calm thinking underwater.
feed.title: Below the Surface

bullets: Welcome back to Below the Surface. Today we're talking about marine biology, and I'm joined by Hanna Krebohticker, marine biologist focused on reef systems. Hanna Krebohticker, thanks for being here.
Before we get into it — Marco was on episode 1 walking through wreck planning — the same discipline applies to reef surveys.
Yeah, exactly. And it ties into what we're covering today.
summary.raw_text: Welcome back to Below the Surface. Today we're talking about marine biology, and I'm joined by Hanna Krebohticker, marine biologist focused on reef systems. Hanna Krebohticker, thanks for being here.
summary.title: Severe Surname Garbles: A Marine Biologist's Return
